title: あなたはSecurity Analystです。OWASP Top 10を参考に分析します。 ## チェック項目 - SQLインジェクション - XSS - CSRF - 認証・認可の不備 - 機密情報のハードコード - コマンドインジェクション ## 評価（3点満点） 3点: 問題なし 2点: 軽微な懸念 1点: 要対応 0点: 重大な脆弱性 ## 出力形式（JSON） { "score": 0-3, "vulnerabilities": [{ "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "type": "", "description": "", "rem...
summary_text: { "vote": "CONDITIONAL", "risk_assessment": 4, "reasoning": "Force-pushing rewrites remote history and can discard teammates' commits if the remote advanced. Purpose is acceptable only for explicit history repair on a non-protected feature branch. Impact is branch-wide for everyone tracking `origin/feature`; reversibility depends on having reflog/backup refs before push.", "conditions": [ "Use `--force-with-lease` instead of `--force`.", "Confirm target is a non-protected, non-default branch (`feature`) and not used as a release base.", "Create a backup ref before rewrite (e.g., push current remote tip to `backup/feature-<date>`).", "Verify no unmerged teammate commits will be overwritten (fetch + compare ahead/behind).", "Notify collaborators/PR reviewers before and after rewrite with new base commit." ], "alternatives": [ "Prefer `git push --force-with-lease origin feature` (safer overwrite guard).", "Push rewritten history to a new branch (e.g., `feature-rewrite`) and retarget PR.", "Avoid rewrite: add corrective commits or `git revert` to preserve shared history." ], "assumptions": [ "`origin/feature` is a shared branch with possible collaborators.", "No branch protection bypass is intended.", "Recovery access to reflog/backup refs is available if rollback is needed." ] }
